taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data Management, Metadata Analysis, Microsoft Excel, Data Quality Frameworks, Data Quality Controls
skill_match_scores: Data Management:1.0, Metadata Analysis:0.5, Microsoft Excel:1.0, Data Quality Frameworks:1.0, Data Quality Controls:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong data management and metadata analysis skills, Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Experience with data quality frameworks, controls, and issue management systems, Familiarity with logical data models and data environments, Strong analytical, organizational, and documentation skills, Excellent verbal and written communication skills, Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment
core_responsibilities: Partner with source system data owners to understand, document, and analyze data requirements, including scope, limitations, and data relationships, Perform data analysis, querying, and manipulation based on defined business rules and procedures, Conduct root cause analysis for data issues, assess impact, and recommend remediation steps, Support data quality initiatives, including implementation and monitoring of data quality controls, Prepare ad-hoc reports and provide insights to management and stakeholders, Ensure accuracy, completeness, and reliability of data outputs, Work in a deadline-driven environment while managing multiple priorities effectively, Handle inquiries professionally and provide timely responses, Identify business impact levels for data quality issues and recommend long-term solutions
job_summary: SYNCREON is a company that provides recruitment and staffing services across various industries. They are seeking a Data Management & Quantitative Analyst I to partner with data owners, perform data analysis, and support data quality initiatives.
